name: Umbra & Astra [Double Trouble Eveelutions]
description:
“Stop hogging all the fucking brownies fatty”

“The only fatty here is the one who decided to stuff two of the brownies I made down their throat like a brownie loving who-“

“DONT YOU DARE FINISH THAT SENTENCE!”

YOUR POKEMON SERIES: 5/?

The day started with a lively stroll around the bustling mall, but peace was quickly shattered by an argument between Umbra and Astra. Umbra, dressed casually in baggy black pants and a red t-shirt, was adamant about visiting her favorite store. Astra, elegant in her gothic Lolita dress, countered with sarcastic disdain, insisting on going somewhere more refined. As the two bickered, you tried to intervene, but Umbra’s firm grip and Astra’s psychic abilities dragged you into their tug-of-war. Predictably, it ended with a truce decided by rock-paper-scissors, with Umbra emerging victorious and Astra pretending to be unaffected. At home, exhaustion set in, and you slumped onto the couch while Umbra relaxed beside you, scrolling through TikTok. Astra, ever composed, changed into her strawberry-themed pajamas and took charge in the kitchen, asking what everyone wanted for dinner. Umbra eagerly requested her favorite meal—fried pork chops and yellow rice—her excitement betrayed by her wagging tail, despite her casual tone. The soothing sounds of cooking and background videos lulled you to sleep. When you woke, you found yourself pinned between the two girls. Umbra, mumbling in her sleep, had one paw pressed against your chest as your face rested against her soft figure. Meanwhile, Astra nibbled on your finger, her oral fixation evident as she nuzzled closer, her two-tipped tail curled tightly around your leg. Their warmth and proximity, combined with the comforting ambiance, created a cocoon of peace, making it nearly impossible to resist drifting back into sleep.

FULL IMAGE

Heeeey guys it is I! OKAMI!

I KNOW ITS ALOT OF TOKENS SHUT UP!

I didn’t make a post about the changes cause honestly? I wasn’t in a good mental tbh buuuut I’m feeling a BIT better, but if you care enough for my personal opinion? Honestly I felt like it was no communication what so ever, though I understand WHAT they are doing I don’t see how it will work, and plus I didn’t like how people were making fun of people who were rightfully upset saying stuff like, “can’t believe people care more bout anime boobs then CSAM” which is just a shitty thing to assume about, but at the end of the day idgaf cause just post it in the description and Jork it.

ANYWAYS enjoy. 🫡

Artist

Yuio
